privileged_info_summary: Ford Motor Company (ticker: F) filed its 2024 Form 10-K annual report with the SEC on February 5, 2025 (accession number 0000037996-25-000013). The Consolidated Statement of Operations for fiscal year 2024 shows Total Revenues of $184,992 million ($184.99 billion) and Net Income attributable to Ford Motor Company of $5,879 million ($5.88 billion). These were Ford's highest revenues on record, representing 5% growth over 2023, with net income increasing 37% year-over-year.
